title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that generates knowledge graphs from large code bases without using RAG, addressing Claude Code's memory limitations. It enables more accurate and token-efficient responses by extracting and structuring code information into graph representations.
